Title: Cuddly Bunny Plush Toy with Cottage Garden Print T-Shirt
Description:
Bring a touch of pastoral charm and endless comfort into your home with this adorable plush bunny. This unique stuffed animal is dressed in a playful tee featuring a charming picnic scene, capturing the sweet essence of a sunny day in a garden.

  • Premium Softness: Crafted with high-quality, cuddly plush material that feels wonderful against the skin, making it perfect for snuggling.
  • Unique Design Detail: Features a charming printed graphic of a colorful garden scene, complete with striped umbrellas and cozy picnic vibes.
  • Durable Comfort: Designed to be a long-lasting keepsake, perfect for hugging and display, while maintaining its soft, huggable form.

This charming bunny makes an ideal gift for birthdays, baby showers, or just because. It adds a whimsical, cheerful pop of color to any room, making it perfect for nursery decor, a child's bedroom, or even a charming shelf display for collectors who love cottagecore aesthetics.
